# Huong dan upload anh cho he sinh thai Ong Quan

Dat anh dung ten de website tu hien thi:

## 1) Tiem ca phe Ong Quan
- Thu muc: `public/uploads/cafe`
- Anh hero: `cafe-hero.png`
- Anh carousel: `cafe-1.png`, `cafe-2.png`, `cafe-3.png`, `cafe-4.png`

## 2) Tiem lau Ong Quan
- Thu muc: `public/uploads/lau`
- Anh hero: `lau-hero.jpg`
- Anh carousel: `lau-1.jpg`, `lau-2.jpg`, `lau-3.jpg`, `lau-4.jpg`

## 3) Ong Quan Farm
- Thu muc: `public/uploads/farm`
- Anh hero: `farm-hero.jpg`
- Anh carousel: `farm-1.jpg`, `farm-2.jpg`, `farm-3.jpg`, `farm-4.jpg`

Luu y:
- Nen dung ti le anh ngang 16:9 hoac 4:3.
- Dung dinh dang `.jpg` hoac `.png`.
- Neu chua upload anh, trang web van hien nen mau du phong.
